title: The Ultimate Supercharger Thread
author: deez337
notes: Only page 1 scraped (29 posts). OP and posts 2+4 contain the master reference for V6 supercharger kits: Alpine Developments (Eaton MP62, Stages 0/1/2, CARB legal, no longer sold), NGM Sniper (MP62) and Assassin (MP90), and RIPP Modifications (Vortech V5 G-Trim, Stages 1/2). Includes pricing, WHP figures, kit contents, and dyno data. Forum metadata date 2021-01-18 is likely last OP edit; earliest reply dates are 2006-11-21. 5 expandable content blocks expanded.
